commands: node $SNAP_CASES_DIR/.shared/mock-npm-registry.mjs -- vp create @your-org:workspace --no-interactive --directory my-mono --git # bundled monorepo: extract tarball, scaffold, inject create.defaultTemplate
test -d my-mono/.git && echo 'Git initialized' # git-init prompt covers bundled monorepo path
cat my-mono/.gitignore # node_modules excluded even though tarball shipped no .gitignore
